$schema.description: Path to this JSON schema, enabling editor autocomplete.

fragLimit.description: Kill limit that ends the round (0 = no limit).

scoreLimit.description: Score limit that ends the round (0 = no limit).

timeLimit.description: Time limit in minutes that ends the round (0 = no limit).

nextMap.description: Map-rotation target: the level number to switch to when a round ends (0 disables rotation).
